name: Love's Travel Stop #553
description: 24-hour Love's travel stop in Williams just off I-40 Exit 163 with truck fueling, showers, a Love's Truck Tire Care center, and a CAT scale.

name: TA Kingman #094
description: TravelCenters of America full-service truck stop on the west side of Kingman at I-40 Exit 48 with fuel, restaurant, showers, and truck repair.

name: Flying J Travel Center #610
description: Pilot Flying J travel center at I-40 Exit 53 in Kingman offering diesel lanes, showers, laundry, Wi-Fi, and an on-site CAT scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #272
description: 24-hour Love's travel stop at I-40 Exit 59 in Kingman with truck parking, fuel lanes, showers, and a truck service bay.

name: Petro Stopping Center #315 (Petro Kingman)
description: Large Petro/TravelCenters of America stopping center at I-40 Exit 66 (Blake Ranch Road) east of Kingman with a CAT scale, Iron Skillet restaurant, showers, tire and truck repair.

name: Crazy Fred's Truck Stop
description: Long-running independent truck stop at I-40 Exit 44 in Kingman with a convenience store, deli, laundry, showers, and tire repair.

name: Topock Port of Entry (Weigh Station)
description: Arizona Department of Transportation commercial port of entry and weigh station on I-40 near Topock, about two miles east of the Arizona/California state line, with weigh-in-motion enabled.
